name: Insource Co., Ltd.
summary: Insource Co., Ltd. provides lecturer dispatch type training, open lecture, and other services in Japan. It offers on-site training; open seminars; other businesses human resource strategy services; management improvement support services; consulting services for local governments/public service agencies; and health and safety support services. Insource Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
